steps.title: Read momentum values from the graph at the endpoints
steps.content: At $x = 2$ seconds, the curve is at $y = 2$ newton-seconds. At $x = 6$ seconds, the curve is at $y = 7$ newton-seconds.

steps.title: Apply the average rate of change formula
steps.content:
Average rate of change is $\frac{\text{change in } y}{\text{change in } x}$. Substitute the values:
$$\text{Average rate of change} = \frac{7 - 2}{6 - 2} = \frac{5}{4} = 1.25$$
The average rate of change in momentum is 1.25 newton-seconds per second.
The answer is 1.25,5/4.
